title: A New Age of War Is Declared
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'll call a different marine for help!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the issue now?! I said everything is under control!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I could never leave him behind!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's right, I went back down on purpose to help her pick up teddy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But now that it's come to this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that the Foothold is done. I'll be sure to climb it this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you fall again, we'll find someone who knows how to climb!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Damned Brats, just you wait and see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! This young lady still needs my help!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm in peak condition, I'm full of potential, hardworking, and on top of that smart!!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
